case_title: COSTARELLA SEAFOOD INC. VS. ALT SFO LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY 25, 2018. AFTER THE CASE WAS CALLED AT 10:30 A.M. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE, THE COURT DISMISSED THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-06-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ALT SFO LLC
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COSTARELLA SEAFOOD INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALT SFO LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2018 - CONTINUED FOR VALID PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-25-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IN OPEN COURT JUDGE TOLD PLAINTIFF THAT PROOF OF SERVICE WAS INVALID, NEEDS TO BE PERSONALLY SERVED. VJ: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED; (D506)
